name: procurement-tracking-phase-a
description: Phase A: schema + lock + ManualUploadSource + dry-run for procurement-tracking ingestion (per LLD.md §5). Standalone reference impl — port src/ into BEE app, run migration via prisma migrate deploy.
comment_scripts: Run via tsx (not bare node --experimental-strip-types): type-stripping does NOT rewrite '.js'→'.ts' import specifiers, so bare node throws ERR_MODULE_NOT_FOUND. For production, `npm run build` then run dist/*.js.
